programme.title: Live International T20 Cricket
programme.desc: Ireland v India. Coverage of the second and final T20 in the series from Stormont Cricket Ground in Belfast. Coming into this series the visitors had won all eight of their matches in this format against Ireland, with the first game being played back in 2009. The last time they met before this set of matches was at the 2024 T20 World Cup, as India won a group match by eight wickets in New York.

programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.sub-title: West Indies v Sri Lanka-1st Test, Day Four
programme.desc: West Indies v Sri Lanka. Coverage of the fourth day of the First Test in the two-match series from Sir Vivian Richards Stadium in Antigua. The hosts haven't won the first game in a series against Sri Lanka since an impressive 226-run win over them in a three-match contest back in June 2018. West Indies made scores of 414-8 declared and 223-7 declared in their two innings as they bowled their visitors out for 185 and 226 to claim a well-earned victory.
